g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Raspberry Pi 5V pin work?')
sendPrompt('How does the NMH0515SC isolated DC-DC converter work?')
sendPrompt('How does the MC7809CTG linear regulator work?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the P93 preamp channels')
g.text: 10µF + 100nF local bypass at each V+ pin — EM272 capsule feed 10kΩ — ~5mA per channel
